componentDescription: A collapsible content component that displays information in a compact, expandable format.

children.description: Specifies the child elements of the Accordion, typically a collection of AccordionItem components.

type.description: Determines the accordion's behavior, such as allowing single or multiple items to be open simultaneously.

defaultValue.description: Sets the initial open state of the accordion items when the component is uncontrolled.

value.description: Controls the open state of accordion items, making the component controlled by its parent.

onValueChange.description: Callback function invoked when the open state of accordion items changes.

collapsible.description: If true, allows all accordion items to be closed, even when `type` is set to 'single'.

shape.description: Defines the visual shape or border style for the accordion component.

variant.description: Specifies the visual variant or theme for the accordion component.

views.description: Customizes the styling properties for various sub-parts of the Accordion component.
